planner_output.reasoning_trace: The user is asking for a laptop recommendation. Laptops are not personal audio devices (headphones, earbuds, on-ear or over-ear headphones). This is completely outside the scope of a personal audio shopping assistant. This should be routed as off-topic.

final_response: Ah, my dear friend, while I appreciate your quest for technological brilliance, my expertise lies firmly within the realm of headphones, earbuds, and all things that cradle your ears in sonic bliss. Think of me as your audio sommelier — here to pair you with the perfect headphones to complement your laptop experience! So, tell me, what kind of auditory adventure are you looking for?
